Tooltip_Vibroblade: Hardened survival blade with high-frequency oscillator inflicts horrific damage with even glancing blows.
Tooltip_AcidGloves: Reinforced dive gloves with an acid-resistant layer.
Tooltip_AcidSuit: Reinforced dive suit with an acid-resistant layer.
Tooltip_NitrogenBrineSuit2: Upgraded dive suit, immune to acid, heat protection up to 90C and depth protection up to 1300m.
Tooltip_NitrogenBrineSuit3: Upgraded dive suit, immune to acid, heat protection up to 105C and effectively-unlimited depth protection.
Tooltip_DiverPerimeterDefenceChip_Broken:
Protects a diver from hostile fauna using electrical discouragement.

Chip has been discharged and is non-functional.
Tooltip_DiverPerimeterDefenceChipItem: Protects a diver from hostile fauna using electrical discouragement. Discharge damages the chip beyond repair.
Tooltip_DiverDefenceSystemMk2: Protects a diver from hostile fauna using electrical discouragement. Can be recharged multiple times.
Tooltip_DiverDefenceMk2_FromBrokenChip: Protects a diver from hostile fauna using electrical discouragement. Can be recharged multiple times.
Tooltip_DiverDefenceSystemMk3: Protects a diver from hostile fauna using electrical discouragement. Can discharge multiple times per charge, and can be recharged multiple times.
Tooltip_HazardShieldItem: Protects the user from hazardous environmental conditions, such as acid or extreme heat.
Tooltip_IlluminatedRebreather: Rebreather equipped with a hands-free lamp.
Tooltip_AcidHelmet: Rebreather treated with an acid-resistant layer.
Tooltip_UltimateHelmet: The ultimate in survival headwear. An acid-resistant, radiation-proof helmet with integrated rebreather and lamp.
Tooltip_PlasteelHighCapTank: Lightweight tank with high oxygen capacity.
Tooltip_DWEBPowerglide: Hold Sprint for dramatic speed bonus underwater with increased energy consumption.
Tooltip_SuperSurvivalSuit: The ultimate in survival gear. Provides protection from extreme temperatures, corrosive substances and physical harm, and reduces the need for external sustenance.
Tooltip_SurvivalSuit: Enhanced survival suit provides passive replenishment of calories and fluids, reducing the need for external sources of sustenance.
Tooltip_ReinforcedSurvivalSuit: Enhanced survival suit with reinforcing fibres provides passive primary needs reduction and protection from physical force and high temperatures.
Tooltip_DWUltraGlideSwimChargeFins: Ultra Glide Fins with the additional tool-charging circuits of the Swim Charge Fins.
Tooltip_ExosuitSolarModule: Recharges Exosuit power cells in sunlight. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_ExosuitSolarModuleMk2: Recharges Exosuit power cells in sunlight, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_ExosuitThermalModuleMk2: Recharges Exosuit power cells in hot zones, and contains an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_ExosuitUnifiedChargerModule: Recharges Exosuit power cells in sunlight or hot areas, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_ExosuitGrappleUpgradeModule: Upgrades all equipped Grappling Arms, improving hook speed and pull speed.
Tooltip_ExosuitLightningClawGeneratorMod: An electrical pulse generator which ties into the Exosuit's claw arm, electrocuting anything struck by it.
Tooltip_SeamothSolarModuleMk2: Recharges Seamoth power cell in sunlight, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeamothThermalModule: Recharges Seamoth power cells in hot zones. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeamothThermalModuleMk2: Recharges Seamoth power cell in hot zones, and contains an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeamothUnifiedChargerModule: Recharges Seamoth power cell in sunlight or hot areas, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_VehicleRepairModule: Passively repairs damaged hull for modest energy cost; in active mode, rapidly repairs damage, but at significant energy cost.
Tooltip_Blueprint_LightRebreatherPlus: The ultimate in survival headwear. An acid-resistant, radiation-proof helmet with integrated rebreather and lamp.
Tooltip_Blueprint_LightRadHelmetPlusRebr: The ultimate in survival headwear. An acid-resistant, radiation-proof helmet with integrated rebreather and lamp.
Tooltip_Blueprint_LightRadHelmetToUltima: The ultimate in survival headwear. An acid-resistant, radiation-proof helmet with integrated rebreather and lamp.
Tooltip_SurvivalSuitBlueprint_FromReinfo: The ultimate in survival gear. Provides protection from extreme temperatures and physical harm, and reduces the need for external sustenance.
Tooltip_InsulatedRebreather: Rebreather equipped with insulation helps slow the onset of hypothermia.
Tooltip_LightColdHelmet: Insulated, heat-retaining helmet equipped with a hands-free lamp.
Tooltip_HighCapacityBooster: Booster tank with increased oxygen capacity.
Tooltip_IonBoosterTank: Booster tank upgraded using Architect hybrid technology; consumes less oxygen while boosting.
Tooltip_ReinforcedColdGloves: Reinforced insulating gloves provide physical protection and insulation from extreme temperatures.
Tooltip_ReinforcedColdSuit: Reinforced, insulated diving suit providing physical protection and insulation from extreme temperatures.
Tooltip_SurvivalColdSuit: Enhanced survival suit provides passive primary needs reduction and protection from extreme cold.
Tooltip_ShadowLeviathanSample: A sample of chitin and ichor from a deadly predator.
Tooltip_HoverbikeBoostUpgradeModule: Reworks boost system, allowing for continuous boost. Be aware of overheating.
Tooltip_HoverbikeDurabilitySystem: Energy field reduces incoming damage, and nanotech repair system passively repairs damage to Snowfox systems. Consumes energy while in use.
Tooltip_HoverbikeEngineEfficiencyModule: Optimises Snowfox power use, reducing battery consumption by 35%. Stacks up to twice.
Tooltip_HoverbikeMobilityUpgrade: Allows Snowfox to jump, travel on water, and provides a modest bonus to speed, without increasing power consumption. Does not stack with Speed Module or Efficiency Upgrade.
Tooltip_HoverbikeQuantumLocker: Quantum Locker that can be fitted to the Snowfox. Activate with C.
Tooltip_HoverbikeSelfRepairModule: Nanotech repair system passively repairs damage to Snowfox systems. Consumes energy while in use.
Tooltip_HoverbikeSolarChargerModule: Recharges the Snowfox's battery while in sunlight. Does not stack.
Tooltip_HoverbikeSpeedModule: Increases Snowfox speed, but also significantly increases power consumption. Does not stack.
Tooltip_HoverbikeStructuralIntegrityModu: Consumes energy to reduce damage taken by the Snowfox by half. Does not stack.
Tooltip_HoverbikeWaterTravelModule: Increases the power of the Snowfox's hover pads, allowing travel over water in exchange for increased energy consumption.
Tooltip_SeatruckSolarModule: Recharges SeaTruck power cells in sunlight. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeatruckSolarModuleMk2: Recharges SeaTruck power cells in sunlight, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeaTruckSonarModule: A dedicated system for detecting and displaying topographical data on the HUD.
Tooltip_SeatruckThermalModule: Recharges SeaTruck power cells in hot zones. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeatruckThermalModuleMk2: Recharges SeaTruck power cells in hot zones, and contains an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeatruckUnifiedChargerModule: Recharges SeaTruck power cells in sunlight or hot areas, and has an internal backup battery. Limited stacking ability.
Tooltip_SeatruckRepairModule: Passively repairs damaged Seatruck and modules for modest energy cost; in active mode, rapidly repairs damage, but at significant energy cost.
Tooltip_SeaTruckUpgradeHorsepower2: Further improves SeaTruck engine power, reducing the impact of a long train. Does not stack.
Tooltip_SeaTruckUpgradeHorsepower3: Maximally improves SeaTruck engine power and minimises the effect of a long train on the Seatruck's speed. Does not stack.
Tooltip_Blueprint_LightColdToUltimateHel: The ultimate in survival headwear. An acid-resistant, radiation-proof helmet with integrated rebreather and lamp.
Tooltip_SurvivalSuitBlueprint_FromReinfo: The ultimate in survival gear. Provides protection from extreme temperatures and physical harm, and reduces the need for external sustenance.
Tooltip_SurvivalSuitBlueprint_FromSurviv: The ultimate in survival gear. Provides protection from extreme temperatures and physical harm, and reduces the need for external sustenance.
